name: The Wedding Operation Event!
description: Date Luminaries for confessions and hidden stories! Limited skins! Join the event, get rewards—enjoy a romantic journey!

name: The Gymnasium Locked-Room Case
description: SSR+ Ironclad Commander Pompey! The Gymnasium Locked-Room Case begins! Join in for the "Slam Dunk Master" skin!

name: The Joyous Union
description: During the event, Limited Summon gives you the chance to obtain "Four Saints - Azure Dragon"—the SSR+ Warrior Luminary of the "Otherworld Return" and "Arcane Wisdom" factions!

name: Sun Goddess Apollo Arrives
description: This round features SSR Ex Luminaries: Sun Goddess - Apollo, Goddess of Wisdom - Athena, Goddess of War - Ares, and Sea Goddess - Poseidon

name: Inkbound Immortal Tales
description: During the event, Limited Summon gives you the chance to obtain the Priest of the "Elemental Echo" and "Sanctum Glory" factions: Lady of the Lake - Vivienne.

name: The Sanctum Shines with Glory, Crowned with Divinity!
description: The brand-new SSR+ quality Luminary "Archangel - Gabriele" is about to take the stage! Join the new limited-time event "Angel Playing House"!
